title: Centre for Climate Change and Water Resources
content: Centre for Climate Change and Water Resources Vision: Creating and disseminating intellectual resources aimed at improving the overall quality of built environment, primarily focusing on climate change and water resources research, education, and sustainable solutions, contributing to global environmental resilience and sustainable development. Mission: The Centre is committed to advancing interdisciplinary research, education, and innovation to address the pressing challenges posed by climate change and water resource management. The Centre aims to foster academic excellence (SDG 4), promote sustainable and equitable water solutions (SDG 6), and build strategic partnerships across academia, government, and industry (SDG 17). Objectives: a. To conduct cutting-edge research in climate change, water resources, and their interconnections, providing data-driven insights and innovative solutions. b. To offer quality education and training programs for students, researchers, and professionals in climate change and water resources management. c. To engage with industry, government, and communities to address pressing environmental challenges and promote sustainable practices. d. To foster interdisciplinary collaboration and knowledge exchange for sustainable water management and climate resilience.
